CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, x UInt32, y UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE patch_table (id UInt32, z UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_table SET x = (SELECT z FROM patch_table WHERE patch_table.id = test_table.id) WHERE id IN (1, 2);
UPDATE test_table SET x = 0 WHERE id = 3;
UPDATE test_table SET x = 100, y = 200 WHERE id % 2 = 0;
UPDATE test_table SET y = y + 10 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE x < 50);
UPDATE test_table SET x = CAST(y AS UInt8) WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE x > 30 AND y < 50);
UPDATE test_table SET x = (SELECT MAX(z) FROM patch_table) WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_table);
UPDATE test_table SET x = 1 WHERE id = 1 AND x < 5;
UPDATE test_table SET y = (SELECT MAX(y) FROM test_table WHERE id != 3) WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_table SET x = x + 10, y = 5 WHERE id < 3;
UPDATE test_table SET y = y - 5 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE y > 20);
UPDATE test_table SET x = 1 WHERE x = 10;
UPDATE test_table SET x = (SELECT AVG(x) FROM test_table) WHERE id = 2;
UPDATE test_table SET x = x + 1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE x < (SELECT AVG(x) FROM test_table));
